title: Review and repair inherited fixes
description: Review the inherited fixes for correctness and regressions, especially security-sensitive C/Rust/Python changes. Fix confirmed issues with independent tests and close the corresponding Beads only after verification.
close_reason: Superseded by concrete recovery and review children under project-LICHEN-2auf, including focused C, Rust, Python, security, routing, and cross-language issues plus final validation/reconciliation tasks. This generic umbrella has no unique acceptance criteria, notes, comments, dependents, or remaining standalone deliverable. Closure does not indicate completion of project-LICHEN-2auf or its open security and validation work.
